description.ko: 고대 지질학과 잊혀진 디지털 시대의 잔해를 혼합하여 지구의 층을 지형학적으로 탐구합니다.
description.en: A topographic exploration of the Earth's layers, blending ancient geology with the remnants of a forgotten digital age.

prompt: A cinematic top-down satellite view of TERRA-1, showcasing a hyper-realistic geological cross-section. The scene features cracked #8B4513 burnt sienna desert clay merging into jagged #2F4F4F volcanic basalt ridges with glowing #D2691E magma veins. Intricate sediment layers and #F4A460 sandy topographic patterns reveal fossilized digital circuits embedded in the rock. Macro-geological details, 8k resolution, natural lighting, capturing the raw power of the Earth's crust.
